mapper.select: SELECT file_id, project_id, file_name, file_path, file_type, uploaded_by, created_at FROM files WHERE project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO files (project_id, file_name, file_path, file_type, uploaded_by) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{fileName}, #{filePath}, #{fileType}, #{uploadedBy})
